final:
module top_module(
    input  wire        clk,
    input  wire        clr,
    input  wire [ 7:0] A,
    input  wire [ 7:0] B,
    output reg  [15:0] Z
);reg [15:0] acc;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (clr) begin
            acc <= 0;
        end else begin
            acc <= A * B;
        end
    end

    assign Z = acc;

endmodule
